rationale: Clause table (all probes executed via rdm story mutation-probe, files auto-restored): (1) merge-commit only — settings.json allow_merge_commit true->false KILLED; (2) squash disabled — allow_squash_merge false->true KILLED; (3) rebase disabled — allow_rebase_merge false->true KILLED; (4) head branch deleted on merge — delete_branch_on_merge true->false KILLED; (5) setup APPLIES the settings — setup.sh gh api --method PATCH repos/$REPO --input $SETTINGS_FILE line replaced with no-op KILLED; (6) setup drift-checks the settings by EXACT projected comparison (amended prose: a subset/containment test is not a drift check) — (a) reverting the settings check to jq contains($want) subset semantics KILLED (caught by both the matches_declared assertion and the contains($want)-absence assertion), (b) gutting the projected-equality helper by renaming def prune($w): KILLED, (c) neutering the live fetch live_settings=$(gh api repos/$REPO) to cat $SETTINGS_FILE (self-comparison) KILLED; (7) declared-as-config-code — covered by construction: the test parses the checked-in github/settings.json directly. 7/7 probes KILLED across 6 probed clauses + 1 by-construction clause; control probe (comment-only mutation in setup.sh) SURVIVED as expected, validating the harness.
